name: InletPressures
description:
Drum Process mode inlet pressure option.
     Minimum: allow any feed inlet pressure. The outlet pressure is then set to the minimum inlet pressure.
     Balanced: automatically set all feed inlet pressures equal. Therefore, exactly one pressure specification
     on the feed line must be freed up, typically a valve's, a pipe's or an exchanger's DP specification.
For Fluid Flow and Dynamic modes all feed inlet pressures are automatically balanced.

name: Separation
description: Drum uses one combined equilibrium holdup or separate vapor and liquid non-equilibrium holdups

name: Orientation
description: Drum orientation vertical, horizontal cylinder or a sphere.

name: RxnRateBasis
description:
Global fluid equilibrium reaction rate basis.
     Absolute: Reaction rates represent absolute molar rates of change. 
     Per Unit Feed: Reaction rates are normalized based on the feed flow 
         rate. Representing the molar change per unit feed, they become
         independent of the absolute flow rate (preferred).

Both options yield identical results, but require different formulations
in the reaction Rate model. “Per Unit Feed” is recommended due to
better numerical stability when stream flows approach zero rate.
Starting with v2023 fluid reactions are defaulted to the "Per Unit Feed"
option.  The "Absolute" option is retained for compatibility with
simulations built before v2023 and will be removed in a future release.

name: StaticHead
description:
Global static head option.
     Include: include the static head contribution to the inlet and outlet ports. 
     Ignore: ignore the static head contribution.
 The StaticHead option relates to Process mode only.

name: ModeCheck
description: Global check for mode change warnings while still in process mode

name: Elevations
description:
Global selection to enable the specification of equipment port elevations.
     Disabled: disable specifications for port elevations.  The elevation change (DE) can still be specified in the Pipe and PipeRig models.
     Manual: manually specify port elevations. DE in the Pipe and PipeRig models can be swapped for port elevation specifications.
     Automatic: automatically calculate port elevations using equipment geometry and configuration options for select models (Column, Drum, etc).

When automatic elevations are enabled, an elevation specification must be removed from each inlet stream of impacted models
(for example, remove the DE specification from an inlet Pipe).
Other model elevations must still be manually specified. For an explanation of how port elevations are estimated, see each model's help file.

name: EntrainType
description:
Drum entrainment model
     Set to 'Process.DefNoEntrain' where entrainment is ignored.
     Set to 'Process.EntrainVL' to specify entrainment with fractions.
To customize, copy the 'Process.EntrainVL' model to the simulation library.

name: HeatModel
description: Drum ambient heat loss model\n     Adiabatic: no heat loss to the surrounding\n     ConstU: set transfer coefficients for the heat loss to the surrounding

name: Insulation
description:
Drum insulation type to set the conductivity k value
     None: k = 0.0 W/m-K
     CalciumSilicate: k = 0.06 W/m-K
     PolyurethaneRigidFoam: k = 0.0255 W/m-K
     MineralWoolRock: k = 0.037 W/m-K
     OneLayerInsulation:  specify k for a single layer
     TwoLayerInsulation:  specify k values for 2 layers
     ThreeLayerInsulation: specify k values for 3 layers

name: HeadRatio
description:
Drum HeadRatio is the ratio of the head length to the radius of the cylinder.
     0: flat heads.
     0.5: standard 2:1 ellipsoid heads.
     1: hemispherical heads.
The HeadRatio parameter is obsolete for spherical drums.

name: Phases
description:
Drum option to override the fluid phase selection
     Fluid: The FluidType's phases are applied.
     VLE: The phases are set to VLE.
     VLWE: The phases are set to VLWE.
     VLLE: The phases are set to VLLE.

name: OutFlashCheck
description: Drum compulsory check for out flash temperature

name: OutFlashNoCheck
description: Drum option to ignore out flash temperature when StaticHead = Include
